attributes.name: offsetTop
attributes.description: Triggered when the specified offset from the top of the window is reached

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Set the element whose scroll event the Affix needs to listen to. The value is a function that returns the corresponding DOM element

attributes.name: offsetBottom
attributes.description: Triggered when the specified offset from the bottom of the window is reached

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Alert type, optional values are `success`, `info`, `warning`, `error` or not set

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Whether to show the close button

attributes.name: description
attributes.description: Auxiliary text introduction for the alert

attributes.name: offsetTop
attributes.description: Triggered when the distance from the top of the window reaches the specified offset

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: Specify the shape of the avatar: circle, square

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Set the size of the avatar

attributes.name: icon
attributes.description: Set the icon type for the avatar

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: Specify the shape of the avatar: circle, square

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Set the size of the avatar

attributes.name: maxCount
attributes.description: Maximum number of images to display

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: The container that needs to scroll to the top

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: The BackTop component is displayed only when the page scroll height reaches this value

attributes.name: right
attributes.description: The distance from the component to the right

attributes.name: bottom
attributes.description: The distance from the component to the bottom

attributes.name: dot
attributes.description: Do not display the number, only a small red dot

attributes.name: htmlType
attributes.description: Set the native type value of the button

attributes.name: block
attributes.description: Option to fit button width to its parent width

attributes.name: loading
attributes.description: Whether the button is in loading mode

attributes.name: target
attributes.description: Equivalent to the target attribute of an a link, takes effect when href exists

attributes.name: href
attributes.description: The address to jump to when clicked. Specifying this property makes the button behave like an a link

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: When shape=circle, presents a circular button

attributes.name: shape
attributes.description: When shape=circle, presents a circular button

attributes.name: bordered
attributes.description: Whether the card displays a border

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: The index of the slide, starting from 0. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

attributes.name: delay
attributes.description: The time interval for auto-switching, in milliseconds

attributes.name: vertical
attributes.description: Whether to display in vertical mode

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

attributes.name: checked
attributes.description: Whether it is selected. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

attributes.name: value
attributes.description: Used to set the currently selected value. Can use `v-model` for two-way binding

attributes.name: indeterminate
attributes.description: Combined auxiliary option controls the indeterminate state

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

attributes.name: openKeys
attributes.description: The `name` of the currently expanded panel. Can use `v-model:openKeys` for two-way binding

attributes.name: accordion
attributes.description: Whether to enable accordion mode. When enabled, at most one panel can be expanded at a time

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: The title of the currently active panel

attributes.name: modelValue
attributes.description: Color value, can use `v-model` for two-way binding

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

attributes.name: mode
attributes.description: Use the `mode` property to customize the date display type. Options: `year`, `month`, `date`, `time`, `dateTime`, `dateRange`, `dateTimeRange`

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Whether to show the clear icon

attributes.name: format
attributes.description: Set the date format. When an array, supports multiple format matches, displayed according to the first one. Configuration reference http://day.js.org/

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: Set the size of the list. Can be set to middle, small

attributes.name: column
attributes.description: The number of DescriptionItems in one row

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: The title of the description list, displayed at the very top

attributes.name: extra
attributes.description: The operation area of the description list, displayed in the upper right corner

attributes.name: closable
attributes.description: Whether to show the close button

attributes.name: title
attributes.description: Drawer title. When null or false, the title is not displayed

attributes.name: height
attributes.description: Drawer height, used when `placement` is `top` or `bottom`, supports percentage

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: The display direction of the drawer. Provides 4 display methods: `left`, `top`, `right`, `bottom`

attributes.name: width
attributes.description: Drawer width, used when `placement` is `left` or `right`, supports percentage

attributes.name: footer
attributes.description: Footer content. Set `footer=null` to not display the footer

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Menu popup position: bottomLeft bottomCenter bottomRight topLeft topCenter topRight

attributes.name: trigger
attributes.description: Trigger method. Supports 3 methods: hover (default), click, custom

attributes.name: placement
attributes.description: Menu popup position: bottomLeft bottomCenter bottomRight topLeft topCenter topRight

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Horizontal or vertical type: horizontal vertical

attributes.name: orientation
attributes.description: The position of the divider title : left right

attributes.name: dashed
attributes.description: Whether it is a dashed line

attributes.name: image
attributes.description: Set the display image. When a string, it represents a custom image address

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: The component renders the theme, defaulting to 'light'.

attributes.name: name
attributes.description: Form name, will be used as the id prefix for form fields

attributes.name: labelCol
attributes.description: Label layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 3, offset: 12}

attributes.name: wrapperCol
attributes.description: Control layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 15, offset: 12}

attributes.name: labelCol
attributes.description: Label layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 3, offset: 12}

attributes.name: wrapperCol
attributes.description: Control layout, same as the `<Col>` component, set span offset values, such as {span: 15, offset: 12}

attributes.name: prop
attributes.description: Corresponds to the field in the form domain model. Required for form validation

attributes.name: justify
attributes.description: Set the alignment of elements on the main axis

attributes.name: cols
attributes.description: Set the number of grid columns. Supports numbers (equal division) or strings (e.g., 1fr 2fr)

attributes.name: rows
attributes.description: Set the number of grid rows or height. Default is auto

attributes.name: autoRows
attributes.description: Implicit grid row height. Used in Bento layout or waterfall flow to set the base height.

attributes.name: xGap
attributes.description: Grid spacing (horizontal direction). Numeric type will automatically add px unit.

attributes.name: yGap
attributes.description: Row spacing (vertical direction). Numeric type will automatically add px unit.

attributes.name: align
attributes.description: Vertical alignment of child items within grid cells

attributes.name: justify
attributes.description: Horizontal alignment of child items within grid cells.

attributes.name: itemMinWidth
attributes.description: Auto-fill mode. Set the minimum width of child items. Grid will automatically calculate the number of columns based on container width.

attributes.name: debug
attributes.description: Debug mode. When enabled, red transparent background columns are displayed to facilitate developer layout alignment.

attributes.name: span
attributes.description: Number of columns occupied. When set to 0, it will be completely hidden (display: none) at this breakpoint

attributes.name: offset
attributes.description: Number of columns to offset to the left. Used to create whitespace without using blank placeholders.

attributes.name: rowSpan
attributes.description: Number of rows occupied. Combined with the container's autoRows, asymmetric layouts can be achieved

attributes.name: suffix
attributes.description: Fixed at the end. When set to true, the item will be forced to the end of the current row.

attributes.name: type
attributes.description: Icon type. Follows the icon naming convention

attributes.name: size
attributes.description: The size of the icon, unit is px

attributes.name: strokeWidth
attributes.description: The line thickness of the icon

attributes.name: theme
attributes.description: When theme='light', presents a light theme

attributes.name: clearable
attributes.description: Whether to show the clear button

attributes.name: visiblePasswordIcon
attributes.description: Whether to show the toggle button or control password visibility

attributes.description: Spacing of child components, optional values `small`, `large`, default not selected
